dashboard.label: DevSecOps — Security Operations Center
dashboard.description: Real-time Layer 7 HTTP flood detection, WAF blocking, CPU stress proxy, and incident timeline. Auto-refreshes every 30 seconds. Index: devsecops_security

search.query: index=devsecops_security sourcetype="aws:waf" action=BLOCK earliest=-15m latest=now | stats count as blocked
index=devsecops_security sourcetype="aws:waf" earliest=-15m latest=now | stats count as total
index=devsecops_security sourcetype="aws:waf" action=BLOCK earliest=-15m latest=now | stats dc(httpRequest.clientIp) as unique_ips
index=devsecops_security sourcetype="app:flask" earliest=-15m latest=now | stats avg(duration_ms) as avg_ms | eval avg_ms=round(avg_ms,1)

panel.title: HTTP Flood Timeline — Requests per 30s by Source IP (Top 5)

search.query: index=devsecops_security sourcetype="aws:waf" earliest=-60m latest=now | timechart span=30s count by httpRequest.clientIp limit=5 useother=false

panel.title: WAF Actions Over Time — BLOCK vs ALLOW

search.query: index=devsecops_security sourcetype="aws:waf" earliest=-60m latest=now | timechart span=30s count by action

panel.title: CPU Stress Proxy — App Response Time Under Flood

search.query: index=devsecops_security sourcetype="app:flask" earliest=-60m latest=now | timechart span=30s avg(duration_ms) as "Avg Response (ms)" perc95(duration_ms) as "p95 Response (ms)"

panel.title: Top Attacking IPs by Blocked Request Count

search.query: index=devsecops_security sourcetype="aws:waf" action=BLOCK earliest=-60m latest=now | stats count as "Blocked Requests" by httpRequest.clientIp | sort -"Blocked Requests" | head 10 | rename httpRequest.clientIp as "Source IP"

panel.title: Attacker Detail — Context for SOC Investigation

search.query: index=devsecops_security sourcetype="aws:waf" action=BLOCK earliest=-60m latest=now | stats count as "Blocked" dc(httpRequest.uri) as "URIs Hit" values(httpRequest.uri) as "Targeted Paths" values(httpRequest.country) as "Country" earliest(_time) as first_epoch latest(_time) as last_epoch by httpRequest.clientIp | eval "First Seen" = strftime(first_epoch, "%H:%M:%S") | eval "Last Seen" = strftime(last_epoch, "%H:%M:%S") | eval "Duration" = tostring(last_epoch - first_epoch, "duration") | sort -Blocked | head 10 | rename httpRequest.clientIp as "Attacker IP" | fields "Attacker IP" Blocked "URIs Hit" "Targeted Paths" Country "First Seen" "Last Seen" Duration

panel.title: Application HTTP Status Breakdown Over Time

search.query: index=devsecops_security sourcetype="app:flask" earliest=-60m latest=now | eval status_class=case( status_code>=500, "5xx Server Error", status_code>=400, "4xx Client Error", status_code>=200, "2xx Success", 1=1, "Other") | timechart span=30s count by status_class

panel.title: Incident Timeline — Last 100 Security Events (newest first)

search.query: index=devsecops_security earliest=-60m latest=now (sourcetype="aws:waf" action=BLOCK) OR (sourcetype="app:flask" status_code>=400) | eval event_type=case( sourcetype="aws:waf" AND action="BLOCK", "WAF Block", sourcetype="app:flask" AND status_code>=500, "App 5xx Error", sourcetype="app:flask" AND status_code>=400, "App 4xx", 1=1, "Other") | eval src_ip = coalesce(httpRequest.clientIp, ip) | eval path = coalesce(httpRequest.uri, endpoint) | eval rule = coalesce(terminatingRuleId, "-") | eval latency = if(isnotnull(duration_ms), duration_ms . " ms", "-") | table _time event_type src_ip path rule status_code latency | rename _time as "Time" event_type as "Event" src_ip as "Source IP" path as "Path" rule as "WAF Rule" status_code as "HTTP Status" latency as "Latency" | sort -Time | head 100
